name: ISO / QMS
description: ISO 9001 (and any other certifications) — internal audits, management reviews, and surveillance.

items.title: Internal Quality Audit
items.description: Planned internal audit covering each function at least once a year.
items.notes: Prepare audit schedule, assign independent auditors, raise NCRs and CARs.

items.title: Management Review Meeting (MRM)
items.description: MRM with top management covering quality objectives, NCR status, customer feedback.

items.title: External surveillance audit
items.description: Annual surveillance audit by certification body. Prepare minimum 2 weeks in advance.

items.title: Document control review
items.description: Review SOPs, formats and work instructions. Obsolete documents removed from circulation.

items.title: Customer feedback & complaints review
items.description: Consolidated review of customer feedback, complaints received, and closure status.

items.title: Instrument calibration check
items.description: Verify calibration certificates are valid and instruments have calibration stickers.

items.title: Training effectiveness review
items.description: Review training conducted vs. plan, gather feedback scores, update training records.

items.title: Approved supplier re-evaluation
items.description: Re-evaluate supplier performance on quality, delivery, cost; update ASL.
